rationale: The citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending prior incentive-aligned preference measurement work (moving beyond hypothetical vs. incentivized choices), and the cited paper is a core prior contribution that introduces an incentive-aligned conjoint mechanism with truth-telling and external-validity evidence.
